rationale: The diff only adds execution metadata. None of the required audit-write API contract documentation or examples are present, so the bead is not implemented.

findings.summary: The only change is an execution result artifact; the required Audit Writes contract section was not added, leaving the write path, schema, idempotency, retention/queryability, and rejection semantics undocumented.
The acceptance criteria also require reference invocation examples for a browser client and an integration worker, but no documentation changes were made to add them.
